## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a frustration or a gap?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or any other context about the request.
